case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. KELLY BRADY et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN LIU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRADY, KELLY $3,357.66 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $200.54 INTEREST, $164.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,382.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
